description: Perform a safety audit on the DrTuxTest database (user: root, no password) to identify patients at risk of drug-drug interactions. Identify all patients who have both 'Kardégic' and 'Sintrom' (case-insensitive) mentioned in their clinical history (Rubriques). Export the list of these patients, including their Full Names and GUIDs, to a CSV file at /home/ga/Documents/interaction_alert_list.csv with columns 'PatientName' and 'GUID'.
